textByHashes.d2dc74fbebaac752f1254466b02e4c437cd115cd: Oh, this? It's just the beginning of something, still a lot more to come.
textByHashes.6d9324f89d86562b363e6b91b7873e085b22bde1: I s'pose the working title is...'The Doors of Dinh'.
textByHashes.ea806951a93547df2e39ebe261abee061c544b9d: We come from Varlamore... We're students of the College of Bards.
textByHashes.4d84f5687212d5ccabcd10b323d7a8677e7bb212: Or did you want to know where I'm from specifically? My home was destroyed long ago by an evil saltwater deity.
textByHashes.e250034ff5fc1be9047c9a67605364dc667af6d9: ...Dragons? Slain. Princesses? Wooed... but revenge, that's still brewing.
